name: ork3-frontend
description: ORK3 front-end asset tooling. Install to pull FullCalendar dist files into the static asset directory.

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p orkui/template/default/script/js/fullcalendar && cp node_modules/@fullcalendar/core/index.global.min.js orkui/template/default/script/js/fullcalendar/core.global.min.js && cp node_modules/@fullcalendar/daygrid/index.global.min.js orkui/template/default/script/js/fullcalendar/daygrid.global.min.js && cp node_modules/@fullcalendar/interaction/index.global.min.js orkui/template/default/script/js/fullcalendar/interaction.global.min.js && npx esbuild node_modules/@zootools/email-spell-checker/dist/index.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=EmailSpellChecker --minify --outfile=orkui/template/revised-frontend/script/email-spell-checker.min.js
